iti50:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti50:1.3: "There are these three roots of what is unskillful. Which three? Greed as a root of what is unskillful, aversion as a root of what is unskillful, delusion as a root of what is unskillful. These are the three roots of what is unskillful."
iti50:1.4: Greed, aversion, delusion destroy the self-same person of evil mind from whom they are born, like the fruiting of the bamboo.
iti50:1.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
